title: athyrium boryanum
intro: Athyrium boryanum, also known as the Bory's lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus and is commonly found in the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium boryanum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
